project.name: retrieval-service
project.description: LanceDB-backed retrieval microservice exposing legacy v1 policy APIs and generic v2 vector collection APIs.

nodes.name: meta.py
nodes.summary: v1 metadata routes exposing policy listings, per-policy table stats, and service capability flags.

nodes.name: relations.py
nodes.summary: v1 relation graph routes for expanding clause links, reverse lookups, and dependent discovery across policies.

nodes.name: search.py
nodes.summary: v1 hybrid search endpoint combining BM25 and vector retrieval with configurable RRF fusion parameters.

nodes.name: v2.py
nodes.summary: Complete v2 REST API for collection-centric document CRUD, hybrid search, prefix overwrite, and capability discovery.

nodes.name: ui_gradio_generic.py
nodes.summary: Gradio interactive demo UI for browsing collections, inspecting metadata, running hybrid search, and dropping v2 collections in-process.
nodes.languageNotes: Directly calls GenericVectorService rather than HTTP, with optional external embedding API integration.

nodes.name: list_policies
nodes.summary: Lists all policy IDs with row counts as PolicyListResponse items.

nodes.name: get_meta
nodes.summary: Returns TableMeta for a policy including dimensions, index flags, and metadata field schemas.

nodes.name: get_capabilities
nodes.summary: Exposes service feature flags such as relations support and embedding availability.

nodes.name: expand_relations
nodes.summary: Expands relation keys from seed clause IDs into connected chunk hits within a policy.

nodes.name: lookup_in_policy
nodes.summary: Looks up chunks referencing a target clause within a specific policy scope.

nodes.name: lookup_dependents
nodes.summary: Finds all policies and clauses that depend on a given target clause.

nodes.name: search
nodes.summary: Runs hybrid BM25+vector search for a policy with RRF fusion and returns ranked SearchHit results.

nodes.name: capabilities_v2
nodes.summary: Returns v2 capability flags including supported search modes and metadata features.

nodes.name: list_collections
nodes.summary: Lists all v2 collections with document counts.

nodes.name: get_collection_meta
nodes.summary: Returns CollectionMeta schema and stats for a single collection.

nodes.name: drop_collection
nodes.summary: Deletes a v2 collection and its LanceDB table.

nodes.name: list_documents
nodes.summary: Paginated document listing with optional where filter for a collection.

nodes.name: list_documents_alias
nodes.summary: Alias route accepting collection_id as query param and delegating to list_documents.

nodes.name: upsert_documents
nodes.summary: Upserts generic document records with optional auto-embedding into a collection.

nodes.name: upsert_documents_alias
nodes.summary: Body-only alias for upsert_documents using collection_id from request payload.

nodes.name: collection_overwrite_by_prefix
nodes.summary: Atomically drops same-prefix collections then upserts documents for prefix-based replacement.

nodes.name: search_documents
nodes.summary: Hybrid search over v2 collection documents with auto-embedding and metadata filtering.

nodes.name: search_documents_alias
nodes.summary: Body-only alias for search_documents using collection_id from request payload.

nodes.name: _tokenize_query
nodes.summary: Lowercases and regex-splits query text into BM25 tokens for display.

nodes.name: _embed_query
nodes.summary: Calls external embedding HTTP API to produce a query vector for hybrid search.

nodes.name: _vector_sparkline
nodes.summary: Renders a compact ASCII sparkline visualization of embedding vector magnitudes.

nodes.name: _dump
nodes.summary: Serializes Pydantic models or dicts to plain dicts for JSON display.

nodes.name: _list_collections
nodes.summary: Fetches collection IDs from the in-process GenericVectorService for UI dropdowns.

nodes.name: _refresh_collection_list
nodes.summary: Refreshes Gradio dropdown choices from the live collection list.

nodes.name: _load_meta
nodes.summary: Loads collection metadata and formats index/schema details for the UI panel.

nodes.name: _browse_documents
nodes.summary: Paginated document browser building a Gradio dataframe with optional vector sparklines.

nodes.name: _search_documents
nodes.summary: Runs in-process hybrid search with optional auto-embedding and formats result tables.

nodes.name: _drop_collection
nodes.summary: Confirms and executes collection deletion, then refreshes the dropdown.

nodes.name: build_generic_demo
nodes.summary: Constructs the full Gradio Blocks layout wiring browse, search, and admin tabs to handlers.

nodes.name: deps.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency that validates API keys from X-API-Key or Bearer Authorization headers against configured settings.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Package barrel that re-exports the generic vector service layer from core for v2 API and UI consumers.
nodes.languageNotes: Thin re-export module wiring v2 routes to GenericVectorService.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application factory wiring lifespan hooks, logging, CORS, static UI, and all v1/v2 API routers into a single ASGI app.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses async lifespan to configure logging and mount multiple router modules.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty router package initializer; routers are imported individually by main.

nodes.name: chunks.py
nodes.summary: v1 chunk management routes for upserting, listing, and dropping policy-scoped LanceDB tables via the generic vector service.

nodes.name: health.py
nodes.summary: Unauthenticated health and example endpoints for load balancer probes and smoke tests.

nodes.name: require_api_key
nodes.summary: Validates incoming API key or Bearer token and raises HTTP 401 when credentials are missing or invalid.

nodes.name: _configure_logging
nodes.summary: Sets Python root logging level from the configured log level string.

nodes.name: lifespan
nodes.summary: Async FastAPI lifespan hook that loads settings, configures logging, and logs service startup/shutdown.

nodes.name: upsert_chunks
nodes.summary: POST handler that upserts chunk rows into a policy table via the vector service in a background thread.

nodes.name: list_chunks
nodes.summary: GET handler paginating chunk rows with optional SQL-like where filter and content inclusion.

nodes.name: drop_policy
nodes.summary: DELETE handler removing an entire policy table from LanceDB storage.

nodes.name: store.py
nodes.summary: Core LanceDB persistence layer: policy-scoped tables, upsert with schema normalization, hybrid FTS+vector search, relation expansion, and index management.
nodes.languageNotes: Module-level locks and table cache coordinate synchronous LanceDB access from async FastAPI via to_thread.

nodes.name: ui_gradio.py
nodes.summary: Legacy policy Gradio demo wiring list/search/browse/drop flows to store or HTTP API per gradio_use_http settings.
nodes.languageNotes: Dual transport: in-process store calls when gradio_use_http is false, else httpx against gradio_api_base_url.

nodes.name: _get_write_lock
nodes.summary: Returns per-policy threading lock to serialize LanceDB writes.

nodes.name: _evict_and_release
nodes.summary: Clears cached table handle and releases write lock after drop or overwrite.

nodes.name: _drop_table_with_retry
nodes.summary: Drops LanceDB table with retries on transient EBUSY errors.

nodes.name: _truncate_and_add
nodes.summary: Replaces table contents via truncate then add Arrow batch.

nodes.name: _overwrite_or_create
nodes.summary: Atomic table recreate or truncate-and-add path for policy data refresh.

nodes.name: _safe_policy_dir
nodes.summary: URL-safe base64 directory name for a policy_id on disk.

nodes.name: _decode_policy_id
nodes.summary: Decodes safe directory name back to original policy_id.

nodes.name: _connect
nodes.summary: Lazy singleton LanceDB connection using store_dir from settings.

nodes.name: _all_table_names
nodes.summary: Lists table names from DB API with filesystem fallback scan.

nodes.name: _table_path
nodes.summary: Resolves on-disk .lance path for encoded policy directory.

nodes.name: table_exists
nodes.summary: Checks whether a policy table is registered in LanceDB.

nodes.name: open_table
nodes.summary: Opens or returns cached Table handle for a policy.

nodes.name: drop_table
nodes.summary: Removes policy table under write lock with cache eviction.

nodes.name: list_policies
nodes.summary: Lists all policy datasets with decoded ids and row counts from LanceDB directory.

nodes.name: _row_to_arrow_dict
nodes.summary: Converts ChunkRow-like dict to Arrow-friendly column dict.

nodes.name: _metadata_fields_from_schema
nodes.summary: Extracts dynamic metadata field names from existing Arrow schema.

nodes.name: _infer_metadata_dtype
nodes.summary: Infers PyArrow dtype for metadata column from sample values.

nodes.name: _metadata_fields_from_rows
nodes.summary: Collects metadata keys present across incoming rows.

nodes.name: _merge_metadata_dtype
nodes.summary: Merges two inferred metadata dtypes for schema evolution.

nodes.name: _coerce_metadata_value
nodes.summary: Casts metadata values to target dtype with JSON fallback.

nodes.name: _normalize_row_for_schema
nodes.summary: Coerces chunk rows to Arrow schema including metadata columns and relation keys.

nodes.name: _build_record_batch
nodes.summary: Builds PyArrow RecordBatch from normalized rows and schema.

nodes.name: _detect_dim
nodes.summary: Reads vector dimension from an open LanceDB table.

nodes.name: _has_index_on
nodes.summary: Checks whether a vector or FTS index exists on a column.

nodes.name: ensure_indexes
nodes.summary: Ensures vector and scalar indexes exist on LanceDB tables per configuration.

nodes.name: _infer_dim
nodes.summary: Infers embedding dimension from row vectors or expected hint.

nodes.name: _auto_embed_missing_vectors
nodes.summary: Fills missing row vectors by calling embed_texts when server fallback is enabled.

nodes.name: _all_rows
nodes.summary: Materializes all table rows as Python dicts for overwrite paths.

nodes.name: _build_batch_from_raw_rows
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper building RecordBatch from raw rows and schema.

nodes.name: upsert
nodes.summary: Creates or updates policy tables, normalizes rows, auto-embeds missing vectors, and manages overwrite modes.

nodes.name: _row_count
nodes.summary: Returns row count for policy or zero if table missing.

nodes.name: _existing_dim
nodes.summary: Returns stored vector dimension for policy if table exists.

nodes.name: _row_to_hit
nodes.summary: Maps LanceDB row dicts to SearchHit pydantic models for API responses.

nodes.name: _table_columns
nodes.summary: Set of column names available on a LanceDB table.

nodes.name: _select_columns
nodes.summary: Builds Lance query projection list respecting content flags.

nodes.name: _safe_search_to_list
nodes.summary: Executes limited search query and returns rows as dict list.

nodes.name: hybrid_search
nodes.summary: Runs FTS and vector retrieval with optional server-side query embedding and RRF-style fusion into SearchHit rows.

nodes.name: list_chunks
nodes.summary: Lists chunk hits with optional SQL where and content projection.

nodes.name: expand_relations
nodes.summary: Expands relation graph from a seed chunk within a policy.

nodes.name: lookup_relations
nodes.summary: Looks up chunks referencing a target policy/clause pair.

nodes.name: lookup_dependents
nodes.summary: Finds dependent chunks across policies for a target clause.

nodes.name: table_meta
nodes.summary: Returns dimension, row counts, and column metadata for a policy table.

nodes.name: _http_request
nodes.summary: Shared httpx client for Gradio HTTP mode against the REST API.

nodes.name: _normalize_hit_dict
nodes.summary: Normalizes SearchHit pydantic or dict into plain dict for UI.

nodes.name: _svc_list_policies
nodes.summary: Fetches policy list via direct store or HTTP meta endpoint.

nodes.name: _svc_table_meta
nodes.summary: Loads table metadata for selected policy in UI.

nodes.name: _svc_list_chunks
nodes.summary: Lists chunks for browse tab via store or REST.

nodes.name: _svc_search
nodes.summary: Runs hybrid search through store or POST /search API.

nodes.name: _svc_drop_policy
nodes.summary: Deletes policy via store.drop_table or HTTP DELETE.

nodes.name: _load_bm25_tokenize
nodes.summary: Loads retrieval.bm25 tokenize function for local query tokenization.

nodes.name: _tokenize_query
nodes.summary: Tokenizes user query text for FTS leg of hybrid search.

nodes.name: _embed_query
nodes.summary: Embeds query locally or via embedding fallback for vector leg.

nodes.name: _vector_sparkline
nodes.summary: Renders ASCII sparkline preview of embedding vector.

nodes.name: _list_policies_choices
nodes.summary: Gradio dropdown choices from current policy list.

nodes.name: _refresh_dataset_list
nodes.summary: Refreshes policy dropdown and clears dependent widgets.

nodes.name: _load_meta
nodes.summary: Populates metadata panel when user selects a policy.

nodes.name: _browse_rows
nodes.summary: Paginated chunk browser with optional vector sparkline display.

nodes.name: _do_search
nodes.summary: Tokenizes query, embeds when needed, and invokes hybrid search via store or HTTP.

nodes.name: _drop_policy
nodes.summary: Confirms and executes policy drop from admin UI.

nodes.name: build_demo
nodes.summary: Constructs the full Gradio Blocks UI for policy browsing, search, and admin actions.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Pydantic Settings loaded from environment and .env; exposes cached get_settings() for host, store paths, API keys, and embedding fallback toggles.

nodes.name: embedding_fallback.py
nodes.summary: OpenAI-compatible /embeddings HTTP client used when vectors are missing; batch embed_texts and single embed_query with graceful error strings.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: CLI entry that loads settings and runs uvicorn against app.main:app with proxy root_path support.

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Runtime configuration model (store_dir, auth, RRF, feature flags, embedding service URLs) via pydantic-settings.

nodes.name: get_settings
nodes.summary: LRU-cached singleton accessor returning a Settings instance.

nodes.name: _parse_embeddings
nodes.summary: Validates and orders OpenAI-style embedding JSON payloads into float vectors.

nodes.name: embed_texts
nodes.summary: POSTs batched texts to configured embedding endpoint; returns vectors or error message without raising.

nodes.name: embed_query
nodes.summary: Single-query wrapper around embed_texts for hybrid search fallback.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Bootstraps uvicorn with host/port/log level from settings and optional PROXY_ROOT_PATH.

nodes.name: adapters.py
nodes.summary: Bidirectional adapters translating between legacy policy/chunk models and the generic v2 collection/document API, including metadata flattening and schema field mapping.

nodes.name: policy_to_collection
nodes.summary: Maps a legacy policy_id to its generic collection_id equivalent for v2 API compatibility.

nodes.name: collection_to_policy
nodes.summary: Maps a generic collection_id back to the underlying LanceDB policy table name.

nodes.name: _normalize_relation_keys
nodes.summary: Normalizes heterogeneous relation key inputs into validated RelationKey model instances.

nodes.name: _flatten_metadata_leaves
nodes.summary: Recursively flattens nested metadata dicts and lists into dot-path scalar leaf values.

nodes.name: _extract_metadata_scalars
nodes.summary: Extracts scalar metadata fields from nested structures and maps them to safe LanceDB column names.

nodes.name: document_to_chunk_row
nodes.summary: Converts a GenericDocumentInput into a legacy ChunkRow with tokenized content, vectors, and flattened metadata scalars.

nodes.name: hit_to_generic_document
nodes.summary: Transforms a legacy SearchHit into a GenericDocumentRecord with parsed metadata for v2 search responses.

nodes.name: field_to_schema_field
nodes.summary: Converts a PyArrow field descriptor into a generic SchemaField model for collection metadata responses.

nodes.name: core.py
nodes.summary: Generic v2 vector service core orchestrating collection management, document upsert/list, and hybrid search over the legacy LanceDB store layer.

nodes.name: CollectionStore
nodes.summary: Manages generic collections backed by policy tables, including listing, existence checks, drops, prefix overwrites, and schema metadata introspection.

nodes.name: DocumentStore
nodes.summary: Handles document upsert and listing for both legacy chunk rows and generic v2 document records via adapter translation.

nodes.name: RetrievalEngine
nodes.summary: Executes hybrid search against policy tables and returns results as generic document records with optional strategy validation.

nodes.name: GenericVectorService
nodes.summary: Facade composing CollectionStore, DocumentStore, and RetrievalEngine with a capabilities endpoint driven by runtime settings.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: Legacy v1 Pydantic models and PyArrow schema builder defining chunk rows, search/upsert requests, relation expansion, and table metadata for policy-based retrieval.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Pydantic BaseModel with field validators and a dynamic PyArrow schema builder for metadata columns.

nodes.name: build_arrow_schema
nodes.summary: Builds a PyArrow schema for LanceDB tables with fixed chunk columns, optional metadata scalar fields, and configurable vector dimensionality.

nodes.name: ChunkRow
nodes.summary: Core row model representing an indexed chunk with content, vector, heading paths, relation keys, and flattened metadata scalars.

nodes.name: SearchHit
nodes.summary: Search result record exposing chunk identity, relevance score, content, and structural metadata returned from hybrid retrieval.

nodes.name: TableMeta
nodes.summary: Policy table metadata including document counts, vector dimension, index flags, schema fields, and filterable/searchable field lists.

nodes.name: schema_generic.py
nodes.summary: Generic v2 Pydantic models for collections, documents, search, upsert, and capabilities, decoupling the public API from legacy policy/chunk terminology.

nodes.name: GenericDocumentInput
nodes.summary: v2 document upsert input with optional precomputed vector, tokenized content, and free-form metadata dict.

nodes.name: GenericDocumentRecord
nodes.summary: v2 document representation returned from search and list endpoints with score and parsed metadata.

nodes.name: CollectionMeta
nodes.summary: Collection-level metadata mirroring legacy TableMeta with document counts, index status, and schema field descriptors.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment variables for embedding service URLs, proxy root path, API key, store directory, and server settings consumed by app/config.py Settings.
nodes.languageNotes: Documents EMBEDDING_*, PROXY_ROOT_PATH, API_KEY, and STORE_DIR overrides; copied to .env at deploy time.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation covering LanceDB hybrid retrieval architecture, PyArrow table schema, local and Docker quick start, Gradio UIs, feature flags, v1/v2 API overview, and integration with the main inference project.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: PEP 621 project metadata and setuptools build configuration for retrieval-service, declaring runtime dependencies (lancedb, fastapi, gradio, jieba) and optional dev extras for pytest.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses setuptools with packages.find limited to app*; dev optional-dependencies group installs pytest and httpx.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Pinned pip requirements list mirroring pyproject.toml runtime dependencies for environments that install via requirements.txt instead of editable pyproject install.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern configuration for Understand-Anything analysis, mirroring gitignore syntax to exclude dirs and test artifacts from graph scanning.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Minimal Python package marker for the app module with no re-exports or initialization logic.

nodes.name: ui.html
nodes.summary: Self-contained LanceDB WebUI single-page app with inline CSS/JS for browsing policies, chunks, hybrid search, and JSON result inspection.

nodes.name: AUTHOR
nodes.summary: Project authorship metadata file listing contributors or maintainers.

nodes.name: diagnose_replicas.py
nodes.summary: Operational diagnostic script that probes replica endpoints for meta, list, chunks, and search consistency via repeated HTTP requests.

nodes.name: lancedb_v2_api.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive v2 API reference covering capabilities negotiation, collection/document models, CRUD endpoints, hybrid search, error semantics, and curl/Python examples.

nodes.name: migration_runbook.md
nodes.summary: Phased migration runbook for rolling out generic v2 capabilities while preserving v1 compatibility, shadow comparison, gray release, and rollback steps.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Retrieval package barrel that re-exports hybrid_search as the public entry point for BM25+semantic+RRF hybrid retrieval.

nodes.name: headers
nodes.summary: Returns HTTP headers dict for authenticated replica probe requests.

nodes.name: _fingerprint
nodes.summary: Builds a stable fingerprint string from response headers for replica comparison.

nodes.name: probe_meta
nodes.summary: Repeatedly fetches policy meta endpoint and aggregates status codes and header fingerprints.

nodes.name: probe_list
nodes.summary: Probes policy list endpoint across replicas and tracks response consistency.

nodes.name: probe_chunks
nodes.summary: Samples chunk rows from list endpoint to detect replica data drift.

nodes.name: probe_search
nodes.summary: Runs hybrid/semantic/BM25 search probes and compares hit fingerprints across replicas.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: CLI entry that sequences meta, list, chunks, and search probes against configured BASE_URL.

nodes.name: bm25.py
nodes.summary: BM25Okapi lexical search module with jieba tokenization, index build/save/load, and top-k scoring over pickled corpora.

nodes.name: hybrid.py
nodes.summary: Hybrid retrieval orchestrator that loads per-policy artifacts, runs BM25 and semantic search in parallel, and fuses rankings via RRF.

nodes.name: indexer.py
nodes.summary: Offline index builder that chunks knowledge roots, writes JSONL metadata, and builds BM25 and embedding matrix artifacts on disk.

nodes.name: rrf.py
nodes.summary: Reciprocal rank fusion utility that merges multiple ranked ID lists into a single fused top-k ordering.

nodes.name: semantic.py
nodes.summary: Semantic vector search over numpy embedding matrices with cosine similarity, optional query embedding, and npy persistence.

nodes.name: shadow_compare.py
nodes.summary: Shadow comparison CLI that runs paired search requests against legacy and candidate services, comparing top-k IDs and latency.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty tests package initializer with no exports.

nodes.name: test_routes.py
nodes.summary: End-to-end pytest suite covering v1 lifecycle, v2 collection flows, auto-embedding, metadata roundtrips, performance baselines, and frontend routes.

nodes.name: build

nodes.summary: Pickle-serializes BM25 index artifacts to disk.

nodes.name: load

nodes.name: search
nodes.summary: Scores query tokens against BM25 index and returns top-k (index, score) pairs.

nodes.summary: Resolves on-disk knowledge root directory for a policy ID via root map lookup.

nodes.name: index_paths

nodes.name: main

nodes.name: test_v2_collection_flow
nodes.summary: End-to-end v2 collection upsert, list, meta, document browse, and hybrid search flow.

nodes.name: test_v2_upsert_auto_embedding_when_vector_missing
nodes.summary: Confirms v2 upsert auto-generates embeddings when document vector is omitted.

nodes.name: test_v2_search_auto_embedding_when_query_vector_missing
nodes.summary: Confirms v2 search embeds query text when query_vector is not provided.

nodes.name: test_v2_metadata_roundtrip_accepts_arbitrary_shapes
nodes.summary: Validates nested arbitrary metadata survives upsert, list, and search roundtrips.

nodes.name: test_v2_metadata_flattened_columns_support_where_filter
nodes.summary: Tests flattened metadata columns enable SQL-like where filters on list and search.

nodes.name: test_v2_collection_overwrite_by_prefix
nodes.summary: Verifies prefix-based collection overwrite replaces matching documents atomically.

nodes.name: test_disable_relations_flag
nodes.summary: Ensures ENABLE_LEGACY_RELATIONS=0 disables relation expansion endpoints.

nodes.name: test_search_performance_baseline
nodes.summary: Benchmarks repeated search latency against a p95 threshold for regression detection.

nodes.name: test_frontend_routes

nodes.name: get_vector_service
nodes.summary: LRU-cached singleton accessor returning a GenericVectorService instance for v1/v2 router dependency injection.

nodes.name: RelationKey
nodes.summary: Pydantic model pairing policy_id and clause_id for cross-chunk relation graph edges.

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: FastAPI route handlers for v1 policy-centric endpoints (search, chunks, relations, meta) and the v2 collection-centric REST API.

layers.name: Retrieval Service Layer
layers.description: Core retrieval logic including LanceDB store access, generic vector service adapters, embedding fallback, and BM25/semantic/hybrid/RRF indexing algorithms.

layers.name: Schema & Types Layer
layers.description: Pydantic models defining v1 policy API contracts and v2 generic collection request/response schemas shared across routers and services.

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: Gradio interactive demos for in-process hybrid search testing and the static HTML UI served alongside the API.

layers.name: Application Bootstrap
layers.description: FastAPI application factory, runtime settings module, package initialization, and the Uvicorn entry point in main.py.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project README, v2 API reference, migration runbook, and Python dependency manifest for deployment and onboarding.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Environment variable template and pyproject.toml packaging metadata that configure service runtime and build settings.

layers.name: Test Layer
layers.description: Pytest integration tests validating HTTP route behavior across v1 and v2 API endpoints.

layers.name: Operations & Utilities
layers.description: Shadow comparison tooling, replica diagnostics, authorship metadata, and codebase analysis ignore rules for ops and maintenance tasks.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to learn what retrieval-service does: a FastAPI microservice over LanceDB that exposes hybrid BM25+vector search, v1 policy APIs, and a newer v2 collection API. The document maps the runtime layout, PyArrow table shape, Docker quick start, Gradio demos, and how this service plugs into the main inference stack.

tour.title: Runtime Entry Points
tour.description: Two entry files split process boot from app assembly. Root main.py loads Settings and launches uvicorn against app.main:app with proxy root_path support, while app/main.py is the FastAPI factory that wires lifespan hooks, logging, CORS, static UI, and every API router into one ASGI application.
tour.languageLesson: In Python ASGI apps, a thin CLI module (main.py) often delegates to an application factory (app/main.py) so the same app object can be imported by tests and uvicorn without re-running CLI parsing.

tour.title: Configuration & Auth
tour.description: app/config.py is the highest fan-in module in the graph: Pydantic Settings read environment variables and .env for host, store paths, API keys, and embedding toggles via cached get_settings(). app/deps.py enforces those settings at the edge by validating X-API-Key or Bearer tokens on protected routes.
tour.languageLesson: Pydantic Settings with lru_cache on get_settings() gives you a single validated config snapshot per process—common in FastAPI services where dependencies call get_settings() on every request.

tour.title: LanceDB Store Layer
tour.description: app/store.py is the persistence core beneath both API generations. It manages policy-scoped LanceDB tables, normalizes rows on upsert, runs hybrid full-text plus vector search, expands relation graphs, and maintains indexes. Understanding the store explains how HTTP handlers stay thin while all LanceDB specifics live in one place.

tour.title: v1 API Routers
tour.description: The v1 surface is split across focused routers mounted by app/main.py. chunks.py handles policy-scoped upsert, list, and drop; search.py runs hybrid BM25+vector retrieval with RRF fusion; meta.py exposes policy listings and capability flags; relations.py expands clause links and dependent lookups across policies.

tour.title: v2 API Router
tour.description: app/routers/v2.py introduces the collection-centric REST API: capabilities discovery, document CRUD, hybrid search, and prefix overwrite. It sits alongside v1 routers at depth 1 in the dependency graph but delegates to the generic vector service rather than calling store.py directly, which is why v2 can evolve its contract independently.

tour.title: Generic Vector Layer
tour.description: The app/generic package is the v2 orchestration layer. __init__.py re-exports the public service; core.py coordinates collection management, document upsert/list, and hybrid search over the legacy store; adapters.py translates between legacy policy/chunk models and generic collection/document shapes so v1 data and v2 APIs can coexist.

tour.title: Embedding Fallback
tour.description: When incoming documents lack vectors, app/embedding_fallback.py calls an OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint to batch-embed texts or single queries. Routers and the generic core depend on this module only when auto-embedding is enabled, keeping HTTP retrieval available even if clients omit precomputed embeddings.
tour.languageLesson: A dedicated fallback client isolates optional network I/O from LanceDB logic—if the embedding service is down, the service can still accept pre-embedded vectors while surfacing clear errors for auto-embed paths.

tour.title: Route Integration Tests
tour.description: tests/test_routes.py exercises the running FastAPI app end-to-end: v1 lifecycle, v2 collection flows, auto-embedding, metadata roundtrips, performance baselines, and frontend routes. Reading these tests after the routers shows the expected request/response contracts and doubles as executable API documentation.

tour.title: v2 API Reference
tour.description: docs/lancedb_v2_api.md is the authoritative contract for the v2 router from Step 6. It documents capabilities negotiation, collection and document models, CRUD and hybrid search endpoints, error semantics, and curl/Python examples—use it when implementing clients or comparing behavior to the generic layer code.
